name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We reconcile credit card statements instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: inefficient reconciliation of credit card statements with company expenses
features: weekly email summaries of reconciled expenses
